entities.summary: An open Senate hearing examining AARO's mission, activities, oversight, budget, reporting process, and analysis of UAP cases.

entities.name: April 5, 1966 House UFO Hearing
entities.summary: A House Armed Services hearing addressing unidentified flying objects and the Air Force investigation program during the period of the Michigan sightings.

entities.summary: A classified briefing involving AARO Director Jon Kosloski and House Oversight members following the November 2024 public hearings.

entities.name: January 12, 2024 House SCIF Briefing
entities.summary: A closed briefing concerning UAP whistleblower allegations and congressional access to information held by the intelligence community.

entities.name: July 13, 2023 UAP Disclosure Act Action
entities.summary: Congressional consideration of UAP disclosure provisions proposed for the Fiscal Year 2024 defense and intelligence authorization process.

entities.name: July 26, 2023 House UAP Hearing
entities.summary: A public House hearing examining military and commercial aviation encounters with unidentified anomalous phenomena, federal handling and classification of UAP information, whistleblower protections, public safety, national security, and congressional oversight.

entities.name: July 29, 1968 House UFO Symposium
entities.summary: A congressional scientific symposium presenting testimony and prepared material on UFO reports, research methods, physical evidence, and possible explanations.

entities.name: May 17, 2022 House Intelligence UAP Hearing
entities.summary: An open hearing followed by a closed classified briefing on the Department of Defense and Intelligence Community response to unidentified aerial phenomena, including reporting, stigma, flight safety, national security, data collection, analysis, and the creation of AOIMSG.

entities.name: May 3, 2022 Classified UAP Briefing
entities.summary: A classified congressional briefing held before the May 17, 2022 public hearing on unidentified aerial phenomena.

entities.name: November 13, 2024 House UAP Hearing
entities.summary: A joint House Oversight hearing examining government transparency, alleged secret UAP programs, aviation and maritime safety, scientific study, whistleblower concerns, and congressional access to UAP information.

entities.name: November 19, 2024 Senate AARO Hearing
entities.summary: An open Senate hearing receiving an update on AARO's activities, priorities, case holdings, data collection, transparency, and unresolved reports.

entities.name: September 9, 2025 House UAP Hearing
entities.summary: A public hearing examining UAP disclosure, AARO and intelligence-community transparency, witness accounts, and protections for national-security whistleblowers.
